description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 13 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 50 mins per day. His WakaTime activity was spread across 5 projects and was mostly in Java (49%), with Markdown (18%) and Other (32%) making up the rest. He had no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos recorded.
